title: Adam Walker (baseball)
extract: Adam Brett Walker II (born October 18, 1991) is an American professional baseball designated hitter for the Oisix Albriex of the Eastern League, a minor league of Nippon Professional Baseball (NPB). He has previously played in the NPB for the Yomiuri Giants and Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks. He was drafted by the Minnesota Twins in the 3rd round of the 2012 Major League Baseball draft.
